step_rationale: Don't-eat-me signal regulating macrophage phagocytosis and immune activation.
mechanism: CD47 'don't-eat-me' signal suppresses macrophage phagocytosis; altered CD47 expression or signaling modulates plaque inflammation and leukocyte activity.

references.title: Subacute treatment of carprofen facilitate splenocardiac resolution deficit in cardiac injury.
